tagline: Keep the knowledge layer in durable Markdown, with plugin trust and sync assumptions visible.

workflow_stages.snapshot: Store PRDs, evidence, and decision notes as plain Markdown with stable links between artifacts.
Use properties, backlinks, and Canvas to show how sources, assumptions, and decisions relate.
Review plugin permissions, sync behavior, and what must remain local before scaling the vault.
